dialogue.speaker: JAXON
dialogue.line: "Another dead body, another case gone cold."
dialogue.visual_cue: Medium shot of JAXON, expression intense and focused.

dialogue.speaker: LUNA
dialogue.line: "Jaxon, I think we have a lead on the latest victim."
dialogue.visual_cue: Close-up of JAXON, his eyes squinting from the rain as he lights a cigarette.

dialogue.speaker: JAXON
dialogue.visual_cue: Medium shot of LUNA, her eyes gleaming with intensity as she steps into the light.

dialogue.speaker: LUNA
dialogue.line: "A cryptic message on the comms system. It reads: 'Eclipse is coming.'"
dialogue.visual_cue: Close-up of JAXON, his eyes narrowing as he takes a drag on his cigarette.

dialogue.speaker: JAXON
dialogue.line: "Sounds like a bunch of hype to me. Eclipse is just a myth."
dialogue.visual_cue: Close-up of LUNA, her eyes scanning JAXON's face for a reaction.

dialogue.speaker: KIARA
dialogue.line: "I didn't mean to see it. I didn't mean to hear it."
dialogue.visual_cue: Medium shot of KIARA, expression intense and focused.

dialogue.speaker: VICTOR
dialogue.line: "You're the one who's been snooping around, Kiara. I should've known."
dialogue.visual_cue: Close-up of KIARA, her eyes welling up with tears as she whispers into her comms device.

dialogue.speaker: LUNA
dialogue.line: "Jaxon, I think we're looking at a bigger picture here. This Eclipse thing is more than just a myth."
dialogue.visual_cue: Medium shot of LUNA, expression intense and focused.

dialogue.speaker: JAXON
dialogue.visual_cue: Close-up of LUNA, her eyes locked intently on JAXON's face as she leans in.

dialogue.speaker: LUNA
dialogue.line: "I think it's a warning. A warning that something big is coming, something that could change the course of the city's history."
dialogue.visual_cue: Medium shot of JAXON, his eyes narrowing as he sets down his pen.

dialogue.speaker: JAXON
dialogue.line: "And you think this message on the comms system is the key to it all?"
dialogue.visual_cue: Close-up of LUNA, her eyes burning with determination as she leans in closer.

characters.name: JAXON
characters.personality: Jaxon appears to be a hardened, skeptical individual who is disheartened by the repetition of unsolved cases, hinting at a sense of frustration and possibly despair.
characters.appearance: Jaxon has a rugged, worn appearance, possibly with a few scars or stubble, fitting for a city detective or investigator.
characters.style_reference: Gritty, rainy city detective film, inspired by the works of David Fincher, with a focus on muted colors and high-contrast lighting.
